location: Dropped by an Erdtree Avatar patrolling near the Great Waterfall Crest Site of Grace in Deeproot Depths.
tactics: Reach Deeproot Depths by defeating the Valiant Gargoyle duo in the tunnel off Siofra River, then lying on the coffin at the back of that boss arena
The Avatar is slow but hits hard with sweeping arm slams and can summon smaller allies to swarm you
Don't confuse it with the Putrid (rotted) Erdtree Avatar in Elphael/Haligtree, which drops the similar-looking Rotten Staff instead
lore: A ceremonial staff carved in the Erdtree's image at the height of its glory, carried by the Avatars who watch over the Minor Erdtrees scattered through the world's depths.

builds.name: Strength/Faith hybrid stat-stick
builds.why: Strength scaling plus D-rank Faith and an innate holy edge let it double as a melee weapon and incantation catalyst for a Strength/Faith build.
